shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- top-level ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "downshift useCombobox useSelect getItemProps aria-selected boolean string" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && printf '\\n--- combobox index ---\\n' && sed -n '1,280p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && printf '\\n--- select index ---\\n' && sed -n '1,300p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && printf '\\n--- combobox tests ---\\n' && rg -n -C 8 \"aria-selected|getItemProps\" src/hooks/useCombobox test/useCombobox.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "aria-selected|getItemProps|highlighted" src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/useSelect test/useCombobox.test.tsx test/useSelect.test.tsx typings/index.d.ts src/types.ts'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
